name: Shedu
description: This arm-cannon, ripped from a Sentient, rapid-fires thermal pulses that explode in an electrical blast. Features an ammo-less quick charge capacitor, that emits a knock-back pulse and strips Sentient damage resistances when fully discharged.

components.name: Barrel
components.description: The barrel component of the Shedu.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This arm-cannon, ripped from a Sentient, rapid-fires thermal pulses that explode in an electrical blast. Features an ammo-less quick charge capacitor, that emits a knock-back pulse and strips Sentient damage resistances when fully discharged.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: The chassis component of the Shedu.

components.name: Handle
components.description: The handle component of the Shedu.

components.name: Receiver
components.description: The receiver component of the Shedu.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed equipped Shedu disappearing when wall latching. As reported here:

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Hotfix 30.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed excessively bright explosion FX from the Shedu and Acceltra.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Reload Speed Mods affecting the Shedu's ammo regeneration delay.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed camera obstruction and misaligned aiming if Xaku’s Grasp creates a Shedu armament.
Fixed being forced to drop the Datamass when swapping to the Shedu.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.0 + 28.2.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased the size of the Shedu explosion FX to better visually represent its radius.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability to equip the Mending Shot Mod on the Shedu. Mending Shot is a Rifle (no AOE) Mod.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.14
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed several script errors that could occur when transitioning to a new area while carrying the Shedu.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.8 + 27.3.8.1 + 27.3.8.2
patchlogs.changes: The Pox, Acceltra, and Shedu have been given explosion FX tweaks for visual and performance improvement.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed ability to trigger the Shedu’s radial explosion multiple times during its cooldown.
Fixed the Shedu and Basmu reload FX being visible while invisible. 
Fixed inability to Chat link Shedu and its parts.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed weapons losing function until you land if the Shedu is equipped while in Archwing and you attempt to switch weapons.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Decreased the distance to point of impact that Self Stagger is inflicted with the Shedu due to having a large AoE range.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed both Host/Client being unable to see or hear each other’s reload FX on the Shedu.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Wisp's Agile animation not idling properly when the Shedu is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.11 - 27.0.11.3
patchlogs.changes: Removed the slight red tint that was always displayed on the Shedu glow, no matter your Energy color choices.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.10
patchlogs.changes: The Shedu Blueprint has been added to Cephalon Simaris’ Lost & Found Offerings (only after acquisition Quest completion).

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where the Shedu would get stuck after regenerating ammo. 
Fixed the Shedu using the wrong weapon mesh when disarmed. 
Fixed the Shedu being unable to use Projectile-based Mods (Speed, etc).
